name: thanks-for-the-feedback-the-science-and-art-of-receiving-feedback-well
description: Douglas Stone and Sheila Heen's guide to receiving feedback well — understanding the three triggers (truth, relationship, identity), managing blind spots, and cultivating a growth identity.
useCase: Learn to receive feedback with less defensiveness, understand the triggers that block learning, and develop the skill of sorting useful feedback from noise.
knownRisks: Requires willingness to self-reflect and be uncomfortable
Some may find the framework too analytical for emotional situations
Change takes practice — not a quick fix
